tools.name: doom_prep
tools.description: Prep Gate. Validates config + confirms the roadmap-signals KB is within the staleness threshold. Fails closed if stale. Call before assess_product.

tools.name: assess_product
tools.description: Assess one product's obsolescence risk. Provide exactly ONE of description/url/pitch_company_id/deck_text. Async — returns job_id; poll get_assessment. Defaults to deep mode. Optionally pass requested_by to identify the caller (shown in the activity feed).

tools.name: get_assessment
tools.description: Poll an assessment job_id. Returns status + the typed assessment when complete. Hard timeout — never hangs on pending.

tools.name: overview
tools.description: Inspectable State. No input. Counts, recent activity, roadmap-signal freshness, health, last calibration run.

tools.name: record_outcome
tools.description: Outcome-feedback (learning loop). Record what ACTUALLY happened to a previously-assessed product as a labeled calibration case; the weekly recalibration folds it into the gate. Operator-only (requires operator_key). Provide either job_id (links the case to that assessment + reuses its product) or pr

tools.name: list_signal_candidates
tools.description: KB-refresh review queue. List auto-scraped candidate roadmap signals (default: pending). Operator-only. Approve/reject with review_signal_candidate; the weekly cron signs approved ones into the live KB.

tools.name: review_signal_candidate
tools.description: Approve or reject a KB-refresh candidate signal. Operator-only. Approved candidates are signed (Ed25519) into the live roadmap_signals KB by the next refresh run; rejected ones are dropped. Controls what becomes grounding truth.

tools.name: list_kb_signals
tools.description: List the active (signed, grounding) roadmap signals with their ids — use to find a signal_id to retire. Operator-only.

tools.name: retire_signal
tools.description: UNLEARN a KB signal that became false/obsolete (e.g. a rumored feature cancelled, or a signal no longer predictive). Soft-deletes it (active=false) so it stops grounding assessments immediately — recoverable. Operator-only. Find the id via list_kb_signals.

tools.name: supersede_calibration_case
tools.description: UNLEARN a calibration case whose label turned out wrong or obsolete — retires it (active=false) so the recalibration gate stops scoring it. To correct, retire the wrong case then record_outcome the right one. Operator-only.
